text: diverey 'amovs asher-haya vanoqedim miteqov'a asher chaza 'al-yiserael bimey ׀ 'uziya melekhe-yehuda uvimey yarave'am ben-yovash melekh yiserael shenatayim lifeney hara'ash
vayomar ׀ yehva mitsiyovn yisheag umirushalaim yiten qovlov veavelu neovt haro'im veyavesh rosh hakaremel f
ko amar yehva 'al-shelosha pishe'ey dameseq ve'al-areba'a lo ashivenu 'al-dusham bacharutsovt habarezel et-hagile'ad
veshilacheti esh beveyt chazael veakhela aremenovt ben-hadad
veshavareti bericha dameseq vehikherati yovshev mibiqe'at-aven vetovmekh shevet mibeyt 'eden vegalu 'am-aram qira amar yehva f
ko amar yehva 'al-shelosha pishe'ey 'aza ve'al-areba'a lo ashivenu 'al-hagelovtam galut shelema lehasegir leedovm
veshilacheti esh bechovmat 'aza veakhela aremenoteyha
vehikherati yovshev meashedovd vetovmekh shevet measheqelovn vahashivovti yadi 'al-'eqerovn veavedu sheerit pelishetim amar adonay yehvi f
ko amar yehva 'al-shelosha pishe'ey-tsor ve'al-areba'a lo ashivenu 'al-hasegiram galut shelema leedovm velo zakheru berit achim
veshilacheti esh bechovmat tsor veakhela aremenoteyha f
ko amar yehva 'al-shelosha pishe'ey edovm ve'al-areba'a lo ashivenu 'al-radefov vacherev achiv veshichet rachamayv vayiterof la'ad apov ve'everatov shemara netsach
veshilacheti esh beteyman veakhela aremenovt batsera f
ko amar yehva 'al-shelosha pishe'ey veney-'amovn ve'al-areba'a lo ashivenu 'al-biqe'am harovt hagile'ad lema'an harechiv et-gevulam
vehitsati esh bechovmat raba veakhela aremenovteyha biteru'a beyovm milechama besa'ar beyovm sufa
vehalakh malekam bagovla hu vesarayv yachedav amar yehva f
ko amar yehva 'al-shelosha pishe'ey movav ve'al-areba'a lo ashivenu 'al-sarefov 'atsemovt melekhe-edovm lasid
veshilacheti-esh bemovav veakhela aremenovt haqeriyovt umet beshaovn movav biteru'a beqovl shovfar
vehikherati shovfet miqirebah vekhal-sareyha eherovg 'imov amar yehva f
ko amar yehva 'al-shelosha pishe'ey yehuda ve'al-areba'a lo ashivenu 'al-maosam et-tovrat yehva vechuqayv lo shamaru vayate'um kizeveyhem asher-halekhu avovtam achareyhem
veshilacheti esh bihuda veakhela aremenovt yerushalaim f
ko amar yehva 'al-shelosha pishe'ey yiserael ve'al-areba'a lo ashivenu 'al-mikheram bakesef tsadiq veeveyovn ba'avur na'alayim
hashoafim 'al-'afar-erets berosh dalim vederekh 'anavim yatu veish veaviv yelekhu el-hana'ara lema'an chalel et-shem qadeshi
ve'al-begadim chavulim yatu etsel kal-mizebecha veyeyn 'anushim yishetu beyt eloheyhem
veanokhi hishemadeti et-haemori mipeneyhem asher kegovah arazim gavehov vechason hu kaalovnim vaashemid pireyov mima'al vesharashayv mitachat
veanokhi he'eleyti etekhem meerets mitserayim vaovlekh etekhem bamidebar areba'im shana lareshet et-erets haemori
vaaqim mibeneykhem lineviim umibachureykhem linezirim haaf eyn-zot beney yiserael neum-yehva
vatashequ et-hanezirim yayin ve'al-haneviim tsivitem lemor lo tinaveu
hine anokhi me'iq tacheteykhem kaasher ta'iq ha'agala hamelea lah 'amir
veavad manovs miqal vechazaq lo-yeamets kochov vegibovr lo-yemalet nafeshov
vetofes haqeshet lo ya'amod veqal beragelayv lo yemalet verokhev hasus lo yemalet nafeshov
veamits libov bagibovrim 'arovm yanus bayovm-hahu neum-yehva f
shime'u et-hadavar haze asher diber yehva 'aleykhem beney yiserael 'al kal-hamishepacha asher he'eleyti meerets mitserayim lemor
raq etekhem yada'eti mikol mishepechovt haadama 'al-ken efeqod 'aleykhem et kal-'aonoteykhem
hayelekhu shenayim yachedav bileti im-nov'adu
hayisheag areye baya'ar veteref eyn lov hayiten kefir qovlov mime'onatov bileti im-lakhad
hatipol tsipovr 'al-pach haarets umovqesh eyn lah haya'aleh-pach min-haadama velakhovd lo yilekovd
im-yitaqa' shovfar be'ir ve'am lo yecheradu im-tiheye ra'a be'ir vayhva lo 'asa
ki lo ya'ase adonay yehvi davar ki im-gala sovdov el-'avadayv haneviim
areye shaag mi lo yira adonay yehvi diber mi lo yinave
hashemi'u 'al-aremenovt beashedovd ve'al-aremenovt beerets mitserayim veimeru heasefu 'al-harey shomerovn ureu mehumot rabovt betovkhah va'ashuqim beqirebah
velo-yade'u 'asovt-nekhocha neum-yehva haovtserim chamas vashod bearemenovteyhem f
lakhen ko amar adonay yehvi tsar useviv haarets vehovrid mimekh 'uzekh venavozu aremenovtayikh
ko amar yehva kaasher yatsil haro'e mipi haari shetey khera'ayim ov vedal-ozen ken yinatselu beney yiserael hayoshevim beshomerovn bifeat mita uvidemesheq 'ares
shime'u veha'idu beveyt ya'aqov neum-adonay yehvi elohey hatsevaovt
ki beyovm paqedi fishe'ey-yiserael 'alayv ufaqadeti 'al-mizebechovt beyt-el venigede'u qarenovt hamizebecha venafelu laarets
vehikeyti veyt-hachoref 'al-beyt haqayits veavedu batey hashen vesafu batim rabim neum-yehva s
shime'u hadavar haze parovt habashan asher behar shomerovn ha'osheqovt dalim harotsetsovt eveyovnim haomerot laadoneyhem havia venishete
nisheba' adonay yehvi beqadeshov ki hine yamim baim 'aleykhem venisa etekhem betsinovt veacharitekhen besirovt duga
uferatsim tetsena isha negedah vehishelakhetena haharemovna neum-yehva
bou veyt-el ufishe'u hagilegal harebu lifesho'a vehaviu laboqer zivecheykhem lisheloshet yamim ma'eseroteykhem
veqater mechamets tovda veqireu nedavovt hashemi'u ki khen ahavetem beney yiserael neum adonay yehvi
vegam-ani natati lakhem niqeyovn shinayim bekhal-'areykhem vechoser lechem bekhol meqovmoteykhem velo-shavetem 'aday neum-yehva
vegam anokhi mana'eti mikem et-hageshem be'ovd shelosha chodashim laqatsir vehimetareti 'al-'ir echat ve'al-'ir achat lo ametir cheleqa achat timater vecheleqa asher-lo-tametir 'aleyha tivash
vena'u shetayim shalosh 'arim el-'ir achat lishetovt mayim velo yiseba'u velo-shavetem 'aday neum-yehva
hikeyti etekhem bashidafovn uvayeraqovn harebovt ganovteykhem vekharemeykhem uteeneykhem vezeyteykhem yokhal hagazam velo-shavetem 'aday neum-yehva s
shilacheti vakhem dever bederekh mitserayim harageti vacherev bachureykhem 'im shevi suseykhem vaa'ale beosh machaneykhem uveapekhem velo-shavetem 'aday neum-yehva
hafakheti vakhem kemahepekhat elohim et-sedom veet-'amora vatiheyu keud mutsal miserefa velo-shavetem 'aday neum-yehva s
lakhen ko e'eseh-lekha yiserael 'eqev ki-zot e'eseh-lakh hikovn liqerat-eloheykha yiserael
ki hine yovtser harim uvore rucha umagid leadam mah-sechov 'ose shachar 'eyfa vedorekh 'al-bamotey arets yehva elohey-tsevaovt shemov s
shime'u et-hadavar haze asher anokhi nose 'aleykhem qina beyt yiserael
nafela lo-tovsif qum betulat yiserael nitesha 'al-adematah eyn meqimah
ki kho amar adonay yehvi ha'ir hayotset elef tasheir mea vehayovtset mea tasheir 'asara leveyt yiserael s
ki kho amar yehva leveyt yiserael direshuni vicheyu
veal-tidereshu beyt-el vehagilegal lo tavou uveer sheva' lo ta'avoru ki hagilegal galo yigele uveyt-el yiheye leaven
direshu et-yehva vicheyu pen-yitselach kaesh beyt yovsef veakhela veeyn-mekhabe leveyt-el
hahofekhim lela'ana mishepat utsedaqa laarets hinichu
'ose khima ukhesil vehofekh laboqer tsalemavet veyovm layela hecheshikh haqovre lemey-hayam vayishepekhem 'al-peney haarets yehva shemov s
hamavelig shod 'al-'az veshod 'al-mivetsar yavov
saneu vasha'ar movkhicha vedover tamim yeta'evu
lakhen ya'an bovshasekhem 'al-dal umaseat-bar tiqechu mimenu batey gazit benitem velo-teshevu vam karemey-chemed neta'etem velo tishetu et-yeynam
ki yada'eti rabim pishe'eykhem va'atsumim chatoteykhem tsorerey tsadiq loqechey khofer veeveyovnim basha'ar hitu
lakhen hamasekil ba'et hahi yidom ki 'et ra'a hi
direshu-tovv veal-ra' lema'an ticheyu vihi-khen yehva elohey-tsevaovt itekhem kaasher amaretem
sineu-ra' veehevu tovv vehatsigu vasha'ar mishepat ulay yechenan yehva elohey-tsevaovt sheerit yovsef s
lakhen koh-amar yehva elohey tsevaovt adonay bekhal-rechovovt miseped uvekhal-chutsovt yomeru hov-hov veqareu ikar el-evel umiseped el-yovde'ey nehi
uvekhal-keramim miseped ki-e'evor beqirebekha amar yehva s
hovy hamiteavim et-yovm yehva lamah-ze lakhem yovm yehva hu-choshekh velo-ovr
kaasher yanus ish mipeney haari ufega'ov hadov uva habayit vesamakh yadov 'al-haqir uneshakhov hanachash
halo-choshekh yovm yehva velo-ovr veafel velo-nogah lov
saneti maaseti chageykhem velo aricha be'atseroteykhem
ki im-ta'alu-li 'olovt uminechoteykhem lo eretse veshelem merieykhem lo abit
haser me'alay hamovn shireykha vezimerat nevaleykha lo eshema'
veyigal kamayim mishepat utsedaqa kenachal eytan
hazevachim uminecha higashetem-li vamidebar areba'im shana beyt yiserael
unesatem et sikut malekekhem veet kiun tsalemeykhem kovkhav eloheykhem asher 'asitem lakhem
vehigeleyti etekhem mehalea ledamaseq amar yehva elohey-tsevaovt shemov f
hovy hashaananim betsiyovn vehabotechim behar shomerovn nequvey reshit hagovyim uvau lahem beyt yiserael
'iveru khalene ureu ulekhu misham chamat raba uredu gat-pelishetym hatovvim min-hamamelakhovt haele im-rav gevulam migevulekhem
hamenadim leyovm ra' vatagishun shevet chamas
hashokhevim 'al-mitovt shen useruchim 'al-'aresovtam veokhelim karim mitson va'agalim mitovkh marebeq
haporetim 'al-pi hanavel kedavid chashevu lahem keley-shir
hashotim bemizereqey yayin vereshit shemanim yimeshachu velo nechelu 'al-shever yovsef
lakhen 'ata yigelu berosh golim vesar mirezach seruchim f
nisheba' adonay yehvi benafeshov neum-yehva elohey tsevaovt metaev anokhi et-geovn ya'aqov vearemenotayv saneti vehisegareti 'ir umeloah
vehaya im-yivateru 'asara anashim bevayit echad vametu
unesaov dovdov umesarefov lehovtsi 'atsamim min-habayit veamar laasher beyareketey habayit ha'ovd 'imakh veamar afes veamar has ki lo lehazekir beshem yehva
ki-hine yehva metsave vehika habayit hagadovl resisim vehabayit haqaton beqi'im
hayerutsun basela' susim im-yacharovsh babeqarim ki-hafakhetem lerosh mishepat uferi tsedaqa lela'ana
hasemechim lelo davar haomerim halov vechazeqenu laqachenu lanu qarenayim
ki hineni meqim 'aleykhem beyt yiserael neum-yehva elohey hatsevaovt govy velachatsu etekhem milevov chamat 'ad-nachal ha'arava s
ko hireani adonay yehvi vehine yovtser govay bitechilat 'alovt halaqesh vehineh-leqesh achar gizey hamelekh
vehaya im-kila leekhovl et-'esev haarets vaomar adonay yehvi selach-na mi yaqum ya'aqov ki qaton hu
nicham yehva 'al-zot lo tiheye amar yehva
ko hireani adonay yehvi vehine qore lariv baesh adonay yehvi vatokhal et-tehovm raba veakhela et-hacheleq
vaomar adonay yehvi chadal-na mi yaqum ya'aqov ki qaton hu
nicham yehva 'al-zot gam-hi lo tiheye amar adonay yehvi s
ko hireani vehine adonay nitsav 'al-chovmat anakh uveyadov anakh
vayomer yehva elay mah-ata roe 'amovs vaomar anakh vayomer adonay hineni sam anakh beqerev 'ami yiserael lo-ovsif 'ovd 'avovr lov
venashamu bamovt yisechaq umiqedeshey yiserael yecheravu veqameti 'al-beyt yarave'am becharev f
vayishelach amatseya kohen beyt-el el-yarave'am melekhe-yiserael lemor qashar 'aleykha 'amovs beqerev beyt yiserael lo-tukhal haarets lehakhil et-kal-devarayv
ki-kho amar 'amovs bacherev yamut yarave'am veyiserael galo yigele me'al adematov s
vayomer amatseya el-'amovs choze lekh berach-lekha el-erets yehuda veekhal-sham lechem vesham tinave
uveyt-el lo-tovsif 'ovd lehinave ki miqedash-melekh hu uveyt mamelakha hu s
vaya'an 'amovs vayomer el-amatseya lo-navi anokhi velo ven-navi anokhi ki-vovqer anokhi uvovles shiqemim
vayiqacheni yehva meacharey hatson vayomer elay yehva lekh hinave el-'ami yiserael
ve'ata shema' devar-yehva ata omer lo tinave 'al-yiserael velo tatif 'al-beyt yisechaq
lakhen koh-amar yehva ishetekha ba'ir tizene uvaneykha uvenoteykha bacherev yipolu veadematekha bachevel techulaq veata 'al-adama temea tamut veyiserael galo yigele me'al adematov s
ko hireani adonay yehvi vehine keluv qayits
vayomer mah-ata roe 'amovs vaomar keluv qayits vayomer yehva elay ba haqets el-'ami yiserael lo-ovsif 'ovd 'avovr lov
veheylilu shirovt heykhal bayovm hahu neum adonay yehvi rav hapeger bekhal-maqovm hishelikh has f
shime'u-zot hashoafim eveyovn velashebit 'anevey kh 'aniyey-arets q
lemor matay ya'avor hachodesh venashebira shever vehashabat venifetechah-bar lehaqetin eyfa ulehagedil sheqel ule'avet mozeney mirema
liqenovt bakesef dalim veeveyovn ba'avur na'alayim umapal bar nashebir
nisheba' yehva bigeovn ya'aqov im-eshekach lanetsach kal-ma'aseyhem
ha'al zot lo-tiregaz haarets veaval kal-yovshev bah ve'aleta khaor kulah venigeresha venisheqa kh venisheqe'a q kiovr mitserayim s
vehaya ׀ bayovm hahu neum adonay yehvi veheveti hashemesh batsahorayim vehachashakheti laarets beyovm ovr
vehafakheti chageykhem leevel vekhal-shireykhem leqina veha'aleyti 'al-kal-matenayim saq ve'al-kal-rosh qarecha vesametiha keevel yachid veacharitah keyovm mar
hine ׀ yamim baim neum adonay yehvi vehishelacheti ra'av baarets lo-ra'av lalechem velo-tsama lamayim ki im-lishemo'a et diverey yehva
vena'u miyam 'ad-yam umitsafovn ve'ad-mizerach yeshovtetu levaqesh et-devar-yehva velo yimetsau
bayovm hahu tite'alafena habetulot hayafovt vehabachurim batsama
hanisheba'im beashemat shomerovn veameru chey eloheykha dan vechey derekh beer-shava' venafelu velo-yaqumu 'ovd s
raiti et-adonay nitsav 'al-hamizebecha vayomer hakh hakafetovr veyire'ashu hasipim uvetsa'am berosh kulam veacharitam bacherev eherog lo-yanus lahem nas velo-yimalet lahem palit
im-yacheteru visheovl misham yadi tiqachem veim-ya'alu hashamayim misham ovridem
veim-yechaveu berosh hakaremel misham achapes uleqachetim veim-yisateru mineged 'eynay beqareqa' hayam misham atsave et-hanachash uneshakham
veim-yelekhu vashevi lifeney oyveyhem misham atsave et-hacherev vaharagatam vesameti 'eyni 'aleyhem lera'a velo letovva
vadonay yehvi hatsevaovt hanovge'a baarets vatamovg veavelu kal-yovshevey vah ve'aleta khayeor kulah veshaqe'a kior mitserayim
habovne vashamayim ma'alovtov kh ma'alovtayv q vaagudatov 'al-erets yesadah haqore lemey-hayam vayishepekhem 'al-peney haarets yehva shemov
halov khiveney khushiyim atem li beney yiserael neum-yehva halov et-yiserael he'eleyti meerets mitserayim ufelishetiyim mikafetovr vaaram miqir
hine 'eyney ׀ adonay yehvi bamamelakha hachataa vehishemadeti otah me'al peney haadama efes ki lo hashemeyd ashemid et-beyt ya'aqov neum-yehva
ki-hine anokhi metsave vahani'ovti vekhal-hagovyim et-beyt yiserael kaasher yinov'a bakevara velo-yipovl tserovr arets
bacherev yamutu kol chataey 'ami haomerim lo-tagish vetaqedim ba'adeynu hara'a
bayovm hahu aqim et-sukat david hanofelet vegadareti et-piretseyhen vaharisotayv aqim uvenitiha kimey 'ovlam
lema'an yireshu et-sheerit edovm vekhal-hagovyim asher-niqera shemi 'aleyhem neum-yehva 'ose zot f
hine yamim baim neum-yehva venigash chovresh baqotser vedorekh 'anavim bemoshekh hazara' vehitifu heharim 'asis vekhal-hageva'ovt titemovgagena
veshaveti et-shevut 'ami yiserael uvanu 'arim neshamovt veyashavu venate'u kheramim veshatu et-yeynam ve'asu ganovt veakhelu et-perihem
uneta'etim 'al-adematam velo yinateshu 'ovd me'al adematam asher natati lahem amar yehva eloheykha
